hooks.command: sh -c 'hook=session-start; for root in "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" $(ls -dt "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/hyperflow-marketplace/hyperflow"/* "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/hyperflow-marketplace/hyperflow"/* 2>/dev/null) "$HOME/.codex/.tmp/marketplaces/hyperflow-marketplace" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/hyperflow-marketplace"; do [ -n "$root" ] && [ -x "$root/hooks/$hook" ] && exec "$root/hooks/$hook"; done; echo "hyperflow hook not found: $hook" >&2; exit 0'

sh -c 'hook=pre-compact; for root in "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" $(ls -dt "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/hyperflow-marketplace/hyperflow"/* "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/hyperflow-marketplace/hyperflow"/* 2>/dev/null) "$HOME/.codex/.tmp/marketplaces/hyperflow-marketplace" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/hyperflow-marketplace"; do [ -n "$root" ] && [ -x "$root/hooks/$hook" ] && exec "$root/hooks/$hook"; done; echo "hyperflow hook not found: $hook" >&2; exit 0'
